name: International Social Security Agreement Exemption

eligibility.description: Applies to individuals working in a foreign country that has a social security agreement with the U.S. and who are subject to that foreign country's social security laws.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Wages received by an individual are exempt from U.S. Social Security and Medicare taxes if the wages are subject to the social security system of a foreign country under a 'Totalization Agreement'.
